features: ULTRA SOFT FABRIC: The heated belt is made of plush, skin-friendly and soft. Warm your body to alleviate discomfort in cold weather. Great for use on the back, stomach, and legs.

3 HEATING SETTINGS: It is equipped with rapid heating technology that heats up the back support straps quickly. It offers 6 temperature settings （40℃-45℃-50℃-55-60℃-65℃）to meet your different temperature needs.
AUTO SHUT OFF: The timer function provides 4 timed auto shut-off ranges from 1 hour to 6 hours, saving energy and preventing burns caused by overheating.

EASY TO USE: Our back heating pads are machine washable and easy to keep clean. Just remove the connecting cord from the heating pad and place it in the washing machine on gentle cycle. It is compact and folds easily for storage and portability!

PERFECT GIFT: This electric heating pad is an ideal gift for family and friends on Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Day, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, birthdays and any other holiday.
